title: The three expressions of a for statement should only be concerned with loop control
description: The three expressions of a "for" statement should only be concerned with loop controlAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearmaintainabilityCode Smellbased-on-misraWhy is this an issue?More Infoforloops are very flexible in C and C++. Because of that, they can carry a complexity that can make the code error-prone, difficult to understand, and hard to maintain.Many for loops can be written in a way that clearly separates the iteration process from the content of the iteration. This rule makes sure that all the code relevant to the iteration is placed in the for-loop header.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: The three expressions of a for statement should only be concerned with loop control
